devdoc.details: Permissionless registration - anyone can register vault mappings  This contract serves as a lookup table for the frontend to discover: - Which ERC-8004 agent ID belongs to a user - Which EncryptedVault address stores their funds

returns.user: The user address associated with this agent

registerUserAgent(address,uint256,addres.details: Permissionless - backend or user can call this

devdoc.title: AgentRegistry

getAgentId(address).notice: Get agent ID for a user

getUserByAgent(uint256).notice: Get user address from agent ID

getVaultAddress(address).notice: Get vault address for a user

isRegistered(address).notice: Check if a user is registered

lookup(address).notice: Lookup agent and vault for a user

registerUserAgent(address,uint256,addres.notice: Register a user's agent and vault mapping

userdoc.notice: Registry mapping users to their ERC-8004 agents and encrypted vaults
